name: Teriyaki Blackened Chicken Satay
recipeIngredient: 8 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
8 ounces mixed greens or your choice of salad mixture
1/4 cup green and white scallions, thinly sliced/rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Skewer chicken as desired. If using wooden skewers, soak them in water to prevent burning.
2. Drizzle chicken with Teriyaki Sauce. Place on hot charcoal broiler and cook the chicken until tender, turning occasionally.
3. Plate presentation: Garnish plate with lettuce mixture spooned with Japanese Vinaigrette. Drizzle warmed Peanut Sauce (warmed) over chicken and plate. Garnish with a sprinkle of scallions, cilantro, and sesame seeds.
